name: finsurfing
shortDescription: Real-time market analysis, AI trade signals, and portfolio management for US equities, ETFs, and crypto.
longDescription: FinSurfing is a full-stack AI investment platform powered by a 5-agent contradiction engine (Fundamental, Technical, Sentiment, Macro, Risk). Features include live market scanning across 40+ universes (stocks, ETFs, crypto, mutual funds), persona-based buy signals channeling Buffett/Dalio/Lynch, real-time social sentiment from Reddit/X, macro regime detection via FRED, TradingView chart integration, portfolio analytics, Monte Carlo simulation, and an agentic Copilot with live tool access.
defaultPrompt: Scan the market and give me today's top investment opportunities with entry zones and stop losses
